SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES GEORGE IS PRESENT WITH ANNA MAU, AAA CLAIMS SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JACQUELINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEORGE, JAMES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
